qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Kerim Alajbegovic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Conceded by Silvan Widmer.
Attempt missed. Edin Dzeko (Bosnia and Herzegovina) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left following a corner.

events.description: 埃丁·哲科射门偏出。 西德·科拉西纳克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Nikola Katic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Offside, Switzerland. Breel Embolo is caught offside.
Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Tarik Muharemovic.
Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Edin Dzeko.
Nico Elvedi (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 本杰明·塔希罗维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Nico Elvedi.

events.description: 扎卡射门被封堵。 尼科·埃尔维迪参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Nikola Katic.
Handball by Amar Dedic (Bosnia and Herzegovina).
Attempt missed. Dan Ndoye (Switzerland) left footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Granit Xhaka.

events.description: 丹·恩多耶射门偏出。 扎卡参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Switzerland. Breel Embolo is caught offside.
Breel Embolo (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 塔里克·穆哈雷莫维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Dan Ndoye (Switzerland).
Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 埃梅丁·德米洛维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Dan Ndoye (Switzerland) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Nikola Vasilj (Bosnia and Herzegovina). Assisted by Breel Embolo.

events.description: 丹·恩多耶射正。 恩博洛参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Remo Freuler (Switzerland) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Dan Ndoye.

events.description: 雷莫·弗罗伊勒射门偏出。 丹·恩多耶参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Breel Embolo (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fabian Rieder (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 本杰明·塔希罗维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Amar Memic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Silvan Widmer (Switzerland).
Corner, Switzerland. Conceded by Nikola Katic.
Attempt saved. Amar Memic (Bosnia and Herzegovina) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Switzerland). Assisted by Kerim Alajbegovic.

events.description: 阿马尔·梅米奇射正。 克里姆·阿拉贝戈维奇参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match (Switzerland).

events.description: 本杰明·塔希罗维奇犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Bosnia and Herzegovina. Ermedin Demirovic is caught offside.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时3分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Switzerland 0, Bosnia and Herzegovina 0.

Granit Xhaka (Switzerland) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Fabian Rieder (Switzerland) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
